framework.name: Agents-are-workloads paradigm
framework.description: Draft explicitly frames AI agents as workloads (not users, not services) — meaning existing workload identity infra (SPIFFE, WIMSE) applies directly. No need for novel identity primitives. This is the key architectural decision.
framework.raw_quote: An Agent is a workload that iteratively interacts with a Large Language Model (LLM) and a set of Tools, Services and Resources.

source.title: draft-klrc-aiagent-auth-00 - AI Agent Authentication and Authorization
